title: CASCaRA Relationship Schema for JSON-LD
description: Validates Relationship class definitions for directed connections between entities. Configures which properties (cas:enumeratedProperty), source links (cas:enumeratedSourceLink) and target links (cas:enumeratedTargetLink) are allowed. Relationships are reified connections that can carry their own properties, enabling rich traceability and dependency modeling (e.g., 'Refinement' relationships with rationale and traceability status). Relationships classify meaningful statements including a subject and an object, where both the subject and the object is an entity or relationship instance. Supports specialization hierarchies and optional icons.

@id.description: The CASCaRA metamodel item type for cas:Relationship

cas:enumeratedProperty.description: Array of Property class references that can be used with this Relationship

cas:enumeratedSourceLink.description: Single link class reference that defines the source endpoint of this Relationship

cas:enumeratedTargetLink.description: Single link class reference that defines the target endpoint of this Relationship plus 0..n link classes pointing to an enumeration

cas:icon.description: Optional icon representation for this Relationship type

idString.description: A valid ID string: either a namespaced identifier (prefix:name) or a URL

languageValue.description: Multi-language text value with optional language tag
